TSIG record)
	algorithm

otherc
Initialize a TSIG rdata.
        *rdclass*, an ``int`` is the rdataclass of the Rdata.
        *rdtype*, an ``int`` is the rdatatype of the Rdata.
        *algorithm*, a ``dns.name.Name``.
        *time_signed*, an ``int``.
        *fudge*, an ``int`.
        *mac*, a ``bytes``
        *original_id*, an ``int``
        *error*, an ``int``
        *other*, a ``bytes``
        N)
